false_positives.what_happened: All top hits are in tests/: parametrized test cases and shared setup/teardown across two test files repeat verbatim by design (same fixtures, same arrange-act-assert skeleton). Not production copypaste.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: apply a higher copypaste threshold (or exclude) for files under tests/ -- repeated fixtures and AAA scaffolding are expected.

note: Test-fixture repetition. No production copypaste. sccs=0.
